title: Research Modern AI Architectures and Save Findings to a Text File
description: Conduct a structured research process on state-of-the-art AI architectures (e.g., Transformers, Mamba, Diffusion Models, Mixture of Experts) and produce a comprehensive, well-organized summary saved as a plain text file.

title: Scope and Prioritize Architectures
description: Define the specific set of modern AI architectures to investigate (e.g., Transformer variants, Mamba, Stable Diffusion, MoE). Prioritize based on impact, novelty, and relevance to current trends. Create a shortlist of 3–5 architectures for deep research.

title: Gather Detailed Information
description: For each architecture in the shortlist, collect key details: core innovation, architecture diagram/logic, typical use cases, performance benchmarks, strengths, and limitations. Use reliable sources such as arXiv papers, official blogs, and known tutorials.

title: Synthesize and Structure Findings
description: Organize the collected information into a coherent narrative. Plan a document structure: header with date & scope, individual sections per architecture, a comparative summary, and references. Ensure each section covers high-level concept, key technical points, and practical implications.

title: Compose the Summary Text
description: Write the full text incorporating all sections. Use clear, concise language suitable for a technical audience. Include a brief introduction, architecture‑specific paragraphs, and a conclusion comparing trade‑offs and suggesting use cases. Add reference citations where appropriate.

title: Save to Text File
description: Write the composed summary to a local text file (e.g., 'modern_ai_architectures.txt'). Ensure proper formatting (line breaks, sections) and handle any file I/O errors gracefully. Confirm the file was saved successfully and output its location.
